vocabulary.example_sentence: He did twelve pull-ups before the boxing tryout.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 拳击选拔前他做了十二个引体向上。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our relay team practised the handoff until it was smooth.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 接力队练习交接棒直到动作顺畅。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She threw the shot-put farther after months of strength training.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 经过数月力量训练，她把铅球推得更远了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Boxing requires speed, strength, and calm under pressure.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 拳击需要速度、力量和在压力下的冷静。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The school competition drew runners from every grade.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 校运会吸引了各年级的赛跑选手。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Only three students passed the tryout for the relay squad.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 只有三名学生通过了接力队选拔赛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A clean handoff in the last leg won us the gold medal.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 最后一棒干净的交接为我们赢得金牌。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Drop the baton and the whole relay team loses time.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 掉了接力棒，整队就会浪费时间。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The judge raised a card showing a perfect ten for figure skating.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 裁判举起卡片，花样滑冰得到满分十分。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The lead runner opened a gap before the final bend.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 领先选手在最后一个弯道前拉开了差距。

vocabulary.example_sentence: An advertisement for sports shoes appeared on the stadium screen.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 体育场大屏上出现运动鞋广告。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our swimmer took the lead in the freestyle final.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们的选手在自由泳决赛中率先领先。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The ice felt smooth under the skater's blades.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 冰刀下滑冰面感觉很顺滑。

vocabulary.chinese: 逼近正在向前的人或物
vocabulary.example_sentence: The runner made up ground on the leader in the last fifty metres.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 最后五十米，这名选手逼近了领先者。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She trained daily to catch up with the top boulderers.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她每天训练以赶上顶尖攀岩选手。

vocabulary.chinese: （冰上动作的）花样；数字；人物；认为
vocabulary.example_sentence: The skater landed a difficult figure after a dramatic spin.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 选手在精彩旋转后完成了高难度花样。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Figure skating combines dance, strength, and cold nerves.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 花样滑冰结合舞蹈、力量与冷静。

vocabulary.example_sentence: His comeback in the relay will amaze the crowd for years.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他在接力中的逆转会让观众多年难忘。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Core strength helps pull-ups and shot-put alike.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 核心力量对引体向上和推铅球都有帮助。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She is truly talented, but still trains before dawn.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她确有天赋，但仍黎明前训练。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We lost the round, but we competed fairly anyway.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们输了这一轮，但无论如何都公平竞赛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Medals gleamed during the opening ceremony.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 开幕式上奖牌闪闪发光。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Neither runner wanted to give up before the finish line.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 两名选手都不想冲线前放弃。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He neither missed training nor skipped the tryout.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他既没缺训，也没缺席选拔赛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Neither rain nor wind stopped the outdoor relay.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 风雨都没阻止户外接力赛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Try out for the team if you love the sport.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 若热爱这项运动，就去参加选拔。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Bouldering builds finger strength without ropes.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 攀岩不用绳子也能练手指力量。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Athletes from Greece compete in both ancient and modern events.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 希腊运动员参加古代与现代项目。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Bing Dwen Dwen became a beloved mascot worldwide.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 冰墩墩成了全球喜爱的吉祥物。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The team motto was "Faster, stronger, together."
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 队伍口号是「更快、更强、一起」。

vocabulary.chinese: 激动人心的；出乎意料的
vocabulary.example_sentence: A dramatic final lap changed the medal count.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 最后一圈戏剧性逆转改变了奖牌榜。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She set a record in the 100-metre freestyle.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她在百米自由泳中创造了纪录。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Talented young runners still need smooth baton passes.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 有天赋的年轻选手仍需要顺畅的交棒。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The crowd watched in wonder as he cleared the high bar.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他越过横杆时，观众惊奇地注视着。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Usain Bolt set a record that stood for years.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 尤塞恩·博尔特创造的纪录保持了很多年。

vocabulary.chinese: 金；金牌；金色；金质的；金色的
vocabulary.example_sentence: She hung the gold medal on her bedroom wall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她把金牌挂在卧室墙上。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Each medal tells a story of training and pride.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每块奖牌都讲述训练与自豪的故事。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Sports reform opened new chances for athletes nationwide.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 体育改革为全国运动员开辟了新机会。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Reform and opening-up helped China host worldwide games.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 改革开放帮助中国承办世界赛事。

vocabulary.chinese: 世界范围的；在全世界；世界各地
vocabulary.example_sentence: The Olympics are watched worldwide every four years.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 奥运会每四年在全球被观看。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Every citizen felt pride when the mascot was unveiled.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 吉祥物发布时，每位公民都感到自豪。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Deep pride filled the stadium when the anthem played.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 奏国歌时，体育场充满深深自豪。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Teams from many nations competed in harmony.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 多国队伍在和谐中竞赛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Fans were deeply moved by Eric Moussambani's finish.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 埃里克·穆桑巴尼的冲线深深打动了观众。

vocabulary.chinese: 最好（或最有意思）的部分
vocabulary.example_sentence: The relay victory was the high point of our season.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 接力胜利是我们本赛季的高潮。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Years of practice helped her master the triple jump.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 多年练习帮她掌握了三级跳。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A fair judge's score should satisfy both teams.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 公正裁判的打分应让双方满意。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He advanced to the next round after a smooth performance.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 表现顺利后他进入了下一轮。

vocabulary.chinese: 希腊的；希腊人的；古希腊人；希腊人
vocabulary.example_sentence: Greek athletes honour traditions born in ancient games.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 希腊运动员传承古代运动会留下的传统。

vocabulary.chinese: 古罗马的；罗马的；罗马人；罗马字体
vocabulary.example_sentence: Roman arenas once hosted crowds as loud as today's stadiums.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 罗马竞技场曾像如今体育场一样人声鼎沸。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Safety rules prevent swimmers from tiring until they drown.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 安全规则防止游泳者力竭溺水。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The crowd roared when the runner took the lead.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 选手领先时，人群沸腾。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Bing Dwen Dwen waved to children at the closing ceremony.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 冰墩墩在闭幕式上向孩子们挥手。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Usain Bolt smiled before breaking another sprint record.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 尤塞恩·博尔特在再破短跑纪录前露出了笑容。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Greece hosted the first modern Olympic Games in 1896.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 希腊在1896年主办了首届现代奥运会。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Eric Moussambani from Equatorial Guinea swam alone in his heat.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 来自赤道几内亚的埃里克·穆桑巴尼独自游完了他的小组赛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Equatorial Guinea sent its first swimmer to the Olympic pool.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 赤道几内亚首次向奥运泳池派出游泳选手。
